home.expert_review1: Far more detailed and accurate than any major app I've tried. Even the smallest questions get thorough answers. I come back every single day.
home.expert_review2: It's not just keyword combinations — the readings are concrete, like having an expert walk through the chart beside you.
home.buyer_subtitle:
Consulting logic informed by experience on major platforms is reflected in the system.
Below are real customer reviews.
home.buyer_review1: I used the service last year; several themes matched what unfolded this year, so I came back. The timing notes were helpful.
home.buyer_review2: The accuracy is high and the details are unmatched — way more satisfying than anything else out there.
home.buyer_review3: It's always spot-on. Every time I re-read my old reading, everything was exactly as described. I'll definitely be back.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1_title: Can I check day-to-day relationship shifts or contact luck with someone I'm interested in?
faq.q1_content: Absolutely. Through the Free Question feature on the 'True Future' page, we precisely calculate the daily movement of the stars to tell you whether today is a good day to reach out first, what kind of mood might unfold during a date, and more — capturing the dynamic daily shifts in your love fortune.
faq.q2_title: Can I get specific dates for things like a confession or reuniting with an ex?
faq.q2_content: Yes, you can. On the 'True Future' page, freely describe your current situation and what you're curious about. Rather than showing preset results, we apply the precise calculations of classical Western astrology to clearly identify the most probable decisive moments — the right time to reach out, confess, or reconnect.
faq.q3_title: Is it okay to ask sensitive questions — like same-sex relationships, secret office romances, or compatibility with a favorite idol?
faq.q3_content: True Future is a contactless automated flow with no in-person session. Questions and inputs are handled through system-based automated processing. You can ask about queer compatibility, celebrity crush charts, and similar topics in text.
faq.q4_title: How is this different from regular BaZi or tarot apps like Jeomshin?
faq.q4_content: We don't only show fixed horoscope blurbs. True Future computes a natal chart from birth time and place and supports free-form text questions. Published reviews and user feedback are available for reference; repeat-visit and reuse metrics are tracked as operational data.
faq.q5_title: When I ask a free question, does a real person answer?
faq.q5_content: No. Responses are generated automatically from interpretation logic derived from professional consulting practice. There is no human consultant in the loop for the same question; answers are produced immediately.

yearly_fortune.subtitle: Explore your daily and lifetime fortune.
yearly_fortune.daily_desc: Just like you need a map in an unfamiliar city, every day needs a sense of direction. Check the path the planets are pointing to — and navigate your day with confidence.
yearly_fortune.lifetime_desc: The moment you were born, the stars drew a one-of-a-kind blueprint just for you. Discover your innate temperament, hidden potential, and life's direction — and learn how to make the most of who you are.

compatibility.intro: It's not just about whether you're a good or bad match. We dig deep into whether each person's preferences, quirks, and sensitivities align — revealing how drawn you are to each other and what might create friction. This is how you understand the true depth of a connection.

consultation.intro: True Future uses classical Western astrology principles and long-established ephemeris-style celestial data. It auto-computes a natal chart from birth time and place and implements interpretation logic from an astrologer with ~20 years of practice as automated responses. It supports free-form questions, compatibility, and daily readings.
